summary: PR 2450 decompiled and typed several ifmagnify functions, added supporting includes/data declarations, updated ifmagnify prototypes, and refined ifMagnify/ifMagnifyPlayer layout. Bot report shows one new full match for ifMagnify_802FC870 and score improvements for four formerly stubbed functions plus related data sections.

key_files.role: Main implementation work: replaced stubs for ifMagnify_802FB73C, ifMagnify_802FB8C0, ifMagnify_802FBBDC, and ifMagnify_802FC3C0; adjusted ifMagnify_802FC870; added includes, extern constants, static data tables, player/offscreen HUD logic, camera/object setup, and color blending.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifmagnify.c hunk replacing /// stubs and modifying ifMagnify_802FC870
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists ifMagnify unit match/improvement scores

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup: replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for three ifMagnify functions with typed signatures and added dolphin/mtx include for Vec2 use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifmagnify.h prototype changes for ifMagnify_802FB73C, ifMagnify_802FB8C0, ifMagnify_802FBBDC

key_files.role: Type recovery: introduced ifMagnifyPlayer, changed ifMagnify first field to DynamicModelDesc*, replaced anonymous player layout with typed player array, and split image_descs/pad storage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h ifMagnifyPlayer typedef and struct ifMagnify layout changes

what_changed.text: Implemented ifMagnify_802FB73C as a helper that clamps/chooses an output Vec2 against boundary constants and records a directional state in ifMagnifyPlayer.state.unk.

Implemented ifMagnify_802FB8C0 as a GX callback that, when HUD and camera conditions permit, computes fighter screen position, rotates/translates the magnify JObj, updates arrow coloring for left/right offscreen states, and clears arrow state otherwise.

Implemented ifMagnify_802FBBDC to reset offscreen flags, configure a camera view per player, classify position against stage camera bounds, blend stage colors through lookup tables, render fighter snapshots into image descriptors, and set player offscreen state.

Implemented ifMagnify_802FC3C0 to create/recreate a magnify GObj, load the model joint from ifMagnify_804A1DE0.model_desc->joint, initialize per-slot image descriptors, bind JObjs, and apply player/team color to materials.
Changed ifMagnify_802FC870 to use a local HSD_Archive** variable, inline the section name "lupe", and use a do-while loop over six player slots; bot report marks this function as a new 100% match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report says ifMagnify_802FC870 94.33% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Updated public prototypes for recovered functions and changed ifMagnify storage/types to expose ifMagnifyPlayer, DynamicModelDesc*, image_descs, and padding.

smart_moves.text: Recovered shared per-player state as a named ifMagnifyPlayer struct instead of keeping anonymous nested fields, making pointer subtraction, GObj/JObj/image descriptor use, and state bitfields more reviewable.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifMagnify_802FB8C0 uses player = arg0->user_data and slot = player - ifMagnify_804A1DE0.player

smart_moves.text: Promoted proven function signatures into the header when function bodies recovered concrete argument and return types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifmagnify.h UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replaced with typed prototypes

smart_moves.text: Used existing HSD and game helper calls for JObj rotation/translation, camera operations, archive loading, player entity lookups, and drawing rather than leaving raw object manipulation throughout the recovered bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: calls to HSD_JObjSetRotationZ, HSD_JObjSetTranslate, HSD_CObjGetOrtho, HSD_CObjSetOrtho, Player_GetEntity, ftDrawCommon_80080C28, lbArchive_LoadSections

smart_moves.text: Kept the exact loop shape that matched ifMagnify_802FC870: a do-while loop over six slots with a local archive variable.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report marks ifMagnify_802FC870 as 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves argument and return types, update the owning header prototypes rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifmagnify.h typed prototypes for ifMagnify_802FB73C, ifMagnify_802FB8C0, ifMagnify_802FBBDC

decomp_lessons.lesson: For object/state-heavy HUD code, introducing a small named per-slot struct can clarify repeated field accesses and enable typed pointer arithmetic for slot calculation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifMagnify_802FB8C0 slot calculation from player pointer

decomp_lessons.lesson: Local loop form can be match-critical: this PR changed a six-iteration for loop into an initialized do-while loop in ifMagnify_802FC870, and the bot report credits that function as newly matched.

naming_conventions.text: Recovered type names follow the subsystem prefix and role pattern: ifMagnifyPlayer for per-player magnify state and ifMagnify for global magnify state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h typedef struct ifMagnifyPlayer and struct ifMagnify

naming_conventions.text: Many data symbols remained address-style names such as ifMagnify_803F9828, ifMagnify_803F984C, and ifMagnify_804DDB28 where semantic ownership or meaning was not established in the PR slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static table and extern float declarations in ifmagnify.c

naming_conventions.text: Locals use short role names where roles are clear, including player, fighter_gobj, screen_pos, interest_pos, world_pos, color_ids, slot_type, and teams_enabled.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local declarations in ifMagnify_802FB8C0, ifMagnify_802FBBDC, ifMagnify_802FC3C0

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used a local HSD_Archive** temporary before lbArchive_LoadSections and inlined the string literal "lupe" in ifMagnify_802FC870; paired with the do-while loop, this produced a reported 100% function match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifMagnify_802FC870 archive variable and "lupe" literal
text_corpus: bot report new match for ifMagnify_802FC870

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Added static data tables for stage color functions and packed color-id lookup values, used by ifMagnify_802FBBDC to select four colors for bilinear blending.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ifMagnify_802FBBDC color_ids and colors[j] lookup

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Recovered bitfield state in ifMagnifyPlayer with is_offscreen, ignore_offscreen, and a 6-bit unk field; function bodies manipulate those bitfields directly.
Added raw static assert-related strings for jobj.h and JOBJ_USE_QUATERNION, but the loaded slice does not show direct use in changed function bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static char ifMagnify_803F988C, ifMagnify_804D57F0, ifMagnify_804D57F8

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported matched code unchanged globally at 66.41% with +120 bytes, one new full match for main/melee/if/ifmagnify ifMagnify_802FC870, and seven improvements including ifMagnify_802FBBDC, ifMagnify_802FB8C0, ifMagnify_802FC3C0, ifMagnify_802FB73C, .data, .sdata2, and .sdata.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed file counts, merged_at
text_corpus: empty PR body and bot report
notes: The diff is complete and strongly supports changed-files, type/prototype updates, and code-shape observations.
There is no PR body and no human review comments in the loaded slice, so reviewer intent and rationale cannot be inferred.
The bot report provides score/match evidence, but no local build command, objdiff details, or adjacent regression checks are included beyond the report summary.
Several added data/extern/static string declarations are visible, but section ownership rationale is not documented in the PR evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed header prototypes should follow recovered bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2450 replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in src/melee/if/ifmagnify.h after recovering typed bodies for ifMagnify_802FB73C, ifMagnify_802FB8C0, and ifMagnify_802FBBDC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: corresponding function bodies in ifmagnify.c

accepted_candidate_records.title: ifMagnify_802FC870 matched with archive temp plus do-while loop
accepted_candidate_records.text: In ifMagnify_802FC870, the PR introduced a local HSD_Archive** variable, passed the inline section string "lupe", and used an initialized do-while loop over six slots. The bot report lists this function as newly 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report new match

source_update_candidates.title: ifmagnify.c handles magnifying/offscreen HUD player indicators
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/if/ifmagnify.c contains magnify/offscreen HUD logic, including per-player offscreen state, camera-bound checks, JObj arrow positioning, team/player coloring, and render-to-image descriptor work.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source/path fact for routing future ifmagnify/offscreen HUD decomp questions; should be verified against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: if/types.h owns ifMagnifyPlayer and ifMagnify layout
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/if/types.h defines ifMagnifyPlayer with GObj, JObj, image descriptor, and bitfield state, and defines ifMagnify with a DynamicModelDesc pointer, player array, image_descs, and padding.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h ifMagnifyPlayer typedef and ifMagnify struct changes
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact about type ownership; should be checked against current source before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human review approval details; no human reviews or review comments are present in the loaded slice.
Do not promote the added static jobj assert strings as an endorsed style; they are visible in the diff but not explained by comments or review.
Do not claim full matches for ifMagnify_802FB73C, ifMagnify_802FB8C0, ifMagnify_802FBBDC, or ifMagnify_802FC3C0; the bot report lists them as improvements below 100%, not full matches.
Do not infer exact semantic names for address-style constants or ifMagnifyPlayer.state.unk beyond what the PR code directly shows.
